nodes.name: Daily 9AM IST
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 09:00. Workflow timezone is Asia/Kolkata (set in Settings), so this fires at 09:00 IST.

nodes.name: Fetch Upcoming Compliance Tasks
nodes.notes: GET /api/compliance/upcoming (internal auth). Returns { tasks: [...], meta } for tier_3 orgs with whatsapp_proactive_enabled=true. Each task has: id, organization_id, task_name, category, due_date, status, is_due_today, is_overdue, owner_phone, language_preference. Tasks where reminder_sent=false OR due today.

nodes.name: Split Into Tasks
nodes.notes: Fans the tasks array to one item per task. This is the last 1:1 node; downstream nodes reference it by name for item-stable lineage.

nodes.name: Has Owner Phone
nodes.notes: Defense-in-depth guard: owner phone and task name must be present. The API already enforces this; guard catches contract drift.

nodes.name: Send Compliance Reminder

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.owner_phone, type: 'template', orgId: $json.organization_id, template: { name: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'compliance_reminder_gujarati' : 'compliance_reminder', language: { code: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'gu' : 'en' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [{ type: 'text', text: String($json.task_name) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.due_date) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.status) }] }] } }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/whatsapp/send (internal auth) → Meta Cloud API. Sends compliance_reminder template (Utility, 3 body variables) to the org OWNER — NEVER to a customer chat (Rule A). Variables: {{1}}=task_name, {{2}}=due_date, {{3}}=status. Gujarati variant: compliance_reminder_gujarati. Template body: '📋 Upcoming: {task_name} due on {date}. Status: {status}.'

nodes.name: Mark Reminder Sent
nodes.notes: POST /api/compliance/{id}/reminder (internal auth). Marks reminder_sent = true so this task is not reminded again until the due date. Reads task id from Split node (last 1:1, item-stable lineage).

nodes.name: Log Reminder Activity

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Split Into Tasks').item.json.organization_id, chatPhone: $('Split Into Tasks').item.json.owner_phone, messageType: 'compliance_reminder_sent', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/analytics/log-intent → PostHog. Privacy-safe: orgId + event type only. Reads org/phone from Split node (last 1:1, item-stable) since Send response strips them.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Set this workflow as its own Error Workflow in Settings > Error Workflow.

nodes.name: Log Error

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'n8n_compliance_reminder', error: $json.error?.message, workflow: $json.workflow?.name, node: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted, executionId: $json.execution?.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: Logs failures to Sentry via /api/errors/log. Never messages a customer chat.
